SEO.title: Ayelen Llampa | Frontend Developer
SEO.description: Portfolio of a web developer specialized in React, Next.js, and JavaScript.

About.hi: Hi! I'm Ayelén, a Frontend Developer focused on building clean and scalable web applications.
About.techs: Over the last few years, I've worked on SaaS products where I was responsible for developing UI features, improving performance, integrating Stripe payment flows and implementing internationalization (i18n).
About.ux: I enjoy working with React, Next.js and TypeScript to translate complex product requirements into intuitive and accessible user interfaces. I care about maintainable architecture, reusable components and real-world performance.
About.background: Before transitioning into tech, I trained as an English teacher. That experience strengthened my communication skills, leadership, and ability to explain complex concepts clearly — qualities that now help me collaborate effectively in remote agile teams and contribute with confidence to frontend decisions.

Main.homeSubtitle: I invite you to know more about me and what I do

Projects.projectsSubtitle: A collection of high-performance digital solutions, focused on clean architecture and exceptional user experiences.

cheers.title: Cheers - SaaS Beverage Ecosystem
cheers.shortDescription: Full-stack SaaS solution featuring real-time ordering and dynamic QR systems.
cheers.description: Engineered a scalable SaaS platform for high-traffic beverage ordering. Focused on building a resilient frontend with React and TypeScript, integrating complex Stripe payment flows, and developing a dynamic QR code generation system for table-specific ordering. Delivered a comprehensive admin dashboard for real-time inventory and sales tracking.

nearbytour.title: NearByTour - Geo-Exploration Platform
nearbytour.shortDescription: Modern travel experience powered by Next.js and real-time geolocation.
nearbytour.description: Architected a high-performance travel platform utilizing Next.js for server-side rendering and SEO optimization. Developed an interactive mapping interface and dynamic discovery cards. Successfully implemented geolocation services and advanced asset optimization, resulting in a seamless mobile-first browsing experience.

aracellipmu.title: Goddess Permanent - E-commerce Growth
aracellipmu.shortDescription: Conversion-driven e-commerce platform with a 40% sales increase.
aracellipmu.description: Designed and developed a specialized e-commerce experience with a focus on conversion rate optimization (CRO). By streamlining the checkout flow and implementing a robust SEO strategy with Next.js, the project contributed to a 40% measurable increase in client sales and significantly improved page speed metrics.

thinderpet.title: ThinderPet - Pet Discovery System
thinderpet.shortDescription: Interactive matching platform with complex state management and fluid UI.
thinderpet.description: Developed a high-engagement pet matching platform featuring advanced multi-criteria filtering and a gesture-based 'swipe' interaction system. Focused on managing complex application states and creating smooth, performant animations for a gamified user experience.

videogames.title: Gaming Nexus - API Dashboard
videogames.shortDescription: Comprehensive gaming database with advanced CRUD and filtering logic.
videogames.description: Built a robust Single Page Application (SPA) consuming a custom-built RESTful API. Implemented sophisticated data management features, including multi-parameter search filters, combined sorting algorithms, and controlled forms for dynamic data entry, all wrapped in a dark-themed gaming aesthetic.

starwars.title: The Force Wiki - Data Explorer
starwars.shortDescription: Dynamic encyclopedia integrating REST APIs with a modular React architecture.
starwars.description: Created an interactive Star Wars encyclopedia by integrating the SWAPI database. Focused on building a highly modular component architecture and an intuitive navigation system. Optimized data fetching patterns to ensure a fast, responsive experience across all device types.

Experience.experienceSubtitle: Technologies, frameworks and tools I use to build modern frontend applications
